title: AI Slop & Synthetic Nostalgia
description: The explosion of uncanny, AI-generated images on social platforms (e.g., 'Shrimp Jesus', 'Cabinets made of sand'). Driven by algorithmic boosts, it has spawned an entire ironic subculture of synthetic nostalgia.

title: Brat Summer & Lime Green
description: Inspired by Charli XCX's album, 'Brat' defined a messy, carefree, party-girl aesthetic. Its signature neon lime green color (#8ACE00) became an instant viral identifier across brand marketing and political endorsements.

title: Minecraft Parkour Story-Reading
description: The viral content format where high-speed, satisfying Minecraft parkour gameplay is paired with synthesized voices reading dramatic Reddit stories (e.g., r/AmITheAsshole). Designed to maximize viewer retention.

title: Looksmaxxing & Mogging
description: A Gen Z subculture surrounding hyper-detailed facial aesthetics, 'mewing', and competitive physical comparison. It evolved from fringe online forums into highly mainstream ironic TikTok humor.

title: Analog Horror & The Backrooms
description: Creepypastas and amateur CGI videos depicting endless, yellow-walled carpeted rooms with fluorescent humming lights. This 'liminal space' aesthetic has inspired indie games, movies, and YouTube short series.

title: ASMR Aesthetic Restocking
description: Ultra-satisfying, highly produced organization videos. Soundtracked by clicky, clacky ASMR sound effects, creators arrange colorful beverages, fresh snacks, and spices into transparent, customized containers.

title: AI NPC Livestreaming
description: Livestreamers acting as scripted video game NPCs, responding to paid digital gifts with repetitive physical catchphrases (e.g., 'Ice cream so good!'). Evolved from bizarre TikTok trends into highly lucrative performance art.

title: Dumbphones & Digital Detox
description: The counter-movement against hyper-addictive smartphones. Gen Z consumers are actively purchasing retro flip phones and feature phones (or turning screens monochrome) to escape the clutches of algorithms.

title: Meme Coin Frenzy
description: Speculative micro-tokens launched on networks like Solana, driven entirely by trending memes, celebrity jokes, or internet drama. Highly volatile, capturing the ultimate fusion of meme culture and absolute financial risk.

title: Brainrot Vocabulary
description: The rapid-fire adoption of highly specific Gen Alpha internet slang (e.g., 'skibidi', 'rizzler', 'fanum tax', 'gyatt'). Evolved from YouTube Shorts and TikTok culture into an entire digital dialect that baffles older generations.
